name: Nexentis Technologies Inc.
business: Nexentis Technologies Inc. is focused on sustainable operations in solar projects and oncology biotechnology. Through its subsidiary MitoCareX, it develops anti-cancer small molecule therapeutics targeting mitochondrial carriers for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer and pancreatic cancer. Through its joint venture Solterra, it develops renewable energy projects in Italy, Poland, and Germany.
sellsTo: Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) and pancreatic cancer patients
European solar energy market (Italy, Poland, Germany)

exposures.sentence: MitoCareX is a drug discovery company dedicated to the development of therapeutics related to cancer and inflammatory metabolic diseases by targeting the mitochondrial carrier family (SLC25A protein family) with a specific focus on one undisclosed SLC25A protein of interest.
Solterra Renewable Energy Ltd., an Israeli corporation (Solterra), operates in the solar energy sector and presents certain investment opportunities in solar photovoltaic (PV) projects.
